channel.title: Web Scrapping on Jodavid Ferreira
channel.description: Recent content in Web Scrapping on Jodavid Ferreira

item.title: Web Scrapping introduction with R
item.description: Hi, in this post I’ll talk about Web Scraping with R. The Project “SERENATA DE AMOR” https://serenata.ai/ is an open project that uses data science - the same technologies used by giants like Google, Facebook and Netflix - for the purpose of monitoring public spending and sharing information in a way accessible to everyone.
